{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source<br>Mirage Name}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Arianrhod's Wheel
|class_id=22849
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=The Wheel is a symbol of the star goddess in ancient Welsh mythology, representing the waxing and waning of the moon in the sky. The divinity of Arianrhod is closely linked to the cyclical movement of the moon, and her strength shines like a full moon, guiding the cycle and changes of life. It has become a symbol of reincarnation in ancient Celtic, and the turning of the Wheel of signifies the twists of fate and the inheritance of Wisdom, like moonlight spreading across the earth, continuously sanctifying and enlightening all beings.
|fame=60
|art=67
|fth=109
|civ=59
|tech=67
|ss1=Dragon Minion RUSH +3%<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 240<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +300
|ss2=Dragon Minion RUSH +4%<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 320<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +400
|ss3=Dragon Minion RUSH +5%<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 400<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +500
|ss4=Dragon Minion RUSH +7%<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 560<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +700
|ss5=Dragon Minion RUSH +9%<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 720<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +900
|ss6=Dragon Minion RUSH +12%<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 960<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +1200
|ss7=Dragon Minion RUSH +12%<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 960<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +1200<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 800 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Dragon Orb Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FTH +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=dungeon@22849_1|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone, +3|orange}}
|3name=Crescent Moon Wheel|3rec=320.62M|3atk=794787|3def=451009|3hp=147611675|3weak=64223
|4name=First Quarter Moon Wheel|4rec=404.56M|4atk=930712|4def=526527|4hp=234997278|4weak=69493
|5name=Full Moon Wheel|5rec=529.71M|5atk=1144600|5def=639121|5hp=420652975|5weak=76684
|6name=Last Quarter Moon Wheel|6rec=703.20M|6atk=1586274|6def=803693|6hp=685147042|6weak=85766
|Arec=973.16M|Aatk=2448975|Adef=1093225|Ahp=1267057103|Aweak=96347
}}
}}

[[Category:Rift Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Dragon Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Protomon Boost]]
[[Category:Minion Skin Boost]]
[[Category:Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Minion HP Boost]]
[[Category:Daily Pack Relics]]
